heading:
Guro
Alvin Penaflor
narrative: Practiced and dabbled in other forms of martial arts from an early age before finding Lapunti. From Karate, Judo, Aikido, Tai Chi, Jeet Kune Do, Krav Maga to lesser known arts like Zeta Zen Aikido and Wonwhado.
Co-founded Lapunti Arnis De Abanico UP Diliman Training Group in 2010. Now known as Lapunti Karilyon.

credentials.promotedBy: Promoted by the art's late Supreme Grandmaster, SGM Undo Caburnay, in 2015.

timeline.event: Began training in Lapunti Arnis De Abanico; co-founded the UP Diliman training group
Group officially recognized as a Lapunti chapter by SGM Undo Caburnay and LADAI Headquarters
Promoted to Guro (Lakan Apat) by SGM Undo Caburnay during the annual club seminar and promotions
Active instructor at Lapunti Karilyon, University of the Philippines, Diliman campus
